metadata.description: Comprehensive security audit orchestration skills for Claude Code. Composes Pashov, Trail of Bits, and custom audit skills into unified pipelines.

plugins.name: cream-full-audit
plugins.description: 4-stage security audit pipeline for DeFi platforms: context building, parallel scanning (8 agents), false-positive validation, and severity-ranked reporting. Composes solidity-auditor (Pashov), Trail of Bits skills, nemesis-auditor, and senior-security into a single command.
